'''Durren''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near the border between the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian]] and [[Antemeridian sector/Legends|Antemeridian sectors]] that was home to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] naval base in Meridian sector.

==History==
Sometime after the collapse of the [[Grissmath Dynasty]], governance of Durren was turned over to the [[Durren Central Planetary Council]], which was formed of six major religions were in power on the planet. During this time, the Durren population had placed the Republic's [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] station, [[Durren Orbital]], in orbit around the planet. The planet was part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] by [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], when [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] engineer [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] instigated a [[Durren rebellion|revolt]] against the Durren Central Planetary Council and also instigated pirate attacks on [[Ampliquen]] to draw the Republic battle cruisers ''[[Caelus]]'' and ''[[Corbantis]]'' away from Durren. The plan succeeded, and both ships were infected with the [[Death Seed]] plague. The cruisers ''[[Courane]]'' and ''[[Fireater]]'' were sent from Durren to investigate the Death Seed breakout on [[Cybloc XII/Legends|Cybloc XII]].<ref name="PoT" />
